HomePage.title: Intelligent Architecture for a Centennial Legacy
HomePage.subtitle: We are the technology and strategy engine behind 'Mana Palm'. Your digital projects breathe life into the southern soil and pave the way for an eternal legacy.

Hub.title: Holding Central Hub
Hub.description: Systematic management of all digital ventures and environmental impact.

Services.title: Digital Services; Business Growth, Nature Revival
Services.subtitle: In challenging economic times, we support you with realistic pricing to modernize your business while contributing to a greener future.

webDesign.title: Starter (Landing Page)
webDesign.desc: Fast, modern design to kickstart your online presence.

consulting.title: AI & Digital Transformation
consulting.desc: Process optimization with AI to reduce your operational costs.

appDev.title: Pro E-Commerce & App
appDev.desc: Comprehensive online sales system to expand your target market.

custom.title: Strategic Partner (Enterprise)
custom.desc: Infrastructure-level custom solutions for large organizations.

Services.phaseDisclaimer: In the current phase (The Seed), revenue is directly invested into grove infrastructure, soil research, and land acquisition. Each pledged sapling is a unit of investment in a green future.

Support.title: Direct Grove Support
Support.subtitle: If you don't need digital services but want to share in reviving nature, you can directly support the infrastructure phase.

Footer.description: Palm Grove Intelligent Holding; merging the art of software with the mission of reviving Iran's nature. We build so life can thrive.
Footer.newsletterDesc: Latest progress reports from the grove and new AI technologies.
Footer.rights: All rights reserved for Palm Grove Holding. © 2026

Transparency.title: Where Does Your Money Go?
Transparency.description: We are building more than just software. We are laying the groundwork for a social enterprise inspired by the Grameen Bank model. Your project funds the critical R&D phase for Iran's largest sustainable palm grove.

step1.title: Research & Location
step1.desc: Currently, revenue funds scientific research on palm species and identifying the optimal soil in southern Iran.

step2.title: Land Acquisition
step2.desc: Securing land for the pilot grove, ensuring water sustainability and environmental compliance.

step3.title: Planting Phase
step3.desc: Employing local communities to plant and nurture the first 10,000 saplings.

step4.title: Organic Market
step4.desc: Selling premium organic dates and products, reinvesting profits into expanding the green belt.

footer.title: Empowering Communities
footer.desc: Our ultimate goal is to create sustainable employment in underprivileged regions. Like a social bank, but backed by nature. Every line of code written here helps plant a job opportunity there.
